name: Caretaker
description: You've always enjoyed the company of animals more than people. Let's be honest, have you ever met a horse you didn't like, compared to a person? Though you have realized while your skills at home were useful for a time, maybe you can go out and do some good with your talent.

feats.name: Animal Person
feats.description: You have a natural affinity with animals. Gain **Resolve** on **skill checks** and can attempt to communicate basic intentions with domesticated or wild animals even without a common language.
